results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'Age-proof strength' is a solid hook but 'loaded carries' is jargon that may lose the busy 25-year-old before they swipe.
rationales.clarity: Each slide holds one idea and the how-to on slide 4 is genuinely actionable this week.
rationales.audience_fit: Longevity framing skews older; a tired 28-year-old grinding through work responds better to 'carry groceries without dying' than 'age-proof.'
rationales.novelty: Loaded carries are underrepresented in health carousels compared to steps or sleep, so this angle earns points despite familiar longevity framing.
rationales.brand_fit: Voice is plain and hedged ('may help', 'linked to'), CTA ties naturally to the score mechanic, no hype words detected.
rationales.predicted_performance: Save-worthy for fitness-curious users but the niche exercise name limits broad share potential versus a hook built around a universal pain point.
